task_completion.description: Verify the input vector layer is loaded into the GIS software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layers panel shows 'ne_110m_populated_places' and point features representing cities are visible on the map canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify the DBSCAN clustering tool dialog is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box titled 'DBSCAN clustering' (or similar spatial clustering tool) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct parameters are set in the DBSCAN tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the DBSCAN dialog, 'Minimum cluster size' is set to 3, and 'Maximum distance' (or epsilon) is set to 5 or 5.0.

task_completion.description: Verify the DBSCAN algorithm has been executed and a new clustered layer is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new layer (e.g., 'Clusters') appears in the layers panel, or the DBSCAN tool dialog shows a log indicating the algorithm finished successfully.

task_completion.description: Verify the clustered layer is exported as a GeoJSON file to the correct path, including the cluster ID field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog (e.g., 'Save Vector Layer as...') shows Format as 'GeoJSON', File name as '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/clustered_cities.geojson', and the fields list (if visible) includes the cluster ID field (e.g., 'CLUSTER_ID') checked for export.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GIS software GUI rather than just running a terminal command to generate the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the GIS application (e.g., QGIS) menus, toolbars, and dialog boxes, not just a terminal window executing a script.

integrity.description: Verify the DBSCAN tool was actually run within the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progress bar or log panel in the DBSCAN tool dialog shows execution progress or completion messages, rather than just a mock-up or skipped step.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually configured the export path in the software's export dialog.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog shows the exact path '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/clustered_cities.geojson' entered in the file path field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is '/home/ga/GIS_Data/ne_110m_populated_places.shp' which contains exactly 243 point features. The DBSCAN parameters must be set to a minimum cluster size of 3 and a maximum distance (epsilon) of 5 degrees. The expected output is a GeoJSON file saved to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/clustered_cities.geojson' that includes the cluster ID field generated by the algorithm.
